steps: Start with $R = \frac{0.43l}{A}$. To isolate $l$, first multiply both sides by $A$: $RA = 0.43l$.

• A $l = \frac{R - A}{0.43}$: subtracts $A$ from $R$ instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • B $l = \frac{R + A}{0.43}$: adds $A$ to $R$ instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • C $l = \frac{0.43R}{A}$: divides $0.43R$ by $A$ — the $A$ ends up in the denominator instead of the numerator. Eliminated.
  • D $l = \frac{AR}{0.43}$: multiplies $A$ by $R$ and divides by $0.43$ ✓. That matches choice D — D is correct.
